subcodes.first_line: We have arisen, speaking in remembrance of God, bewildered by the manifestations of His grandeur, the power of His Most Exalted Pen and His sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اصبحنا ناطقا بذکر الله و متحیرا فی ظهورات عظمته و اقتدار قلمه الاعلی و سلطنه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
